description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can of juice with a predominantly white and black exterior, accented by a pink band and fruit imagery. The can features a pull tab on top for opening, and the label displays vibrant images of dragon fruit, suggesting the juice flavor. Nutritional information and ingredients are printed on the back in both pink and green text, with additional branding and product details visible around the circumference. The surface is glossy and smooth, typical of beverage cans, and the can appears to be sealed and unopened. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for display in urban environments such as convenience stores, vending machines, or outdoor kiosks.
description: A tall, slim aluminum can of juice with a glossy white, black, and pink design, featuring dragon fruit imagery and detailed labeling.
description_view_0: The can's side shows a partial fruit illustration, barcode, and part of the brand label on a white and black background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the nutritional information panel and ingredients list, with pink and green text on the white and black can.
description_view_2: The back of the can displays a dragon fruit graphic, vitamin information, and product claims in pink and green text.
description_view_3: The front view features the main fruit illustration, the '100% NATURAL' label, and the most prominent branding elements.
